Using a sharp knife, cut both to pand bottom from the oranges so that all skin and pith is removed but no flesh
Shaving from top to bottom, remove skin and pith from sides all the way around.
Cut segments from the orange, leaving connective tissue
Cut each segment into four equel pieces
Lightly coat with white granulated sugar
Spread out on a sizzle plate or pass tray
Using a butane food torch, ignite away from the food first to eliminate excess butane
Bring flame above orange segments and toast until caramelized
Season lightly with salt after
Reserve in quart or pint containers and store in the cooler.
